name: code-block
title: CodeBlock
description: Scrollable monospace code surface with optional language or filename context and copy action.

intent.summary: Scrollable monospace code surface with optional language or filename context and copy action.
useWhen: A message or document displays fenced code that readers may copy.
avoidWhen: A live editor, terminal, diff viewer, or syntax-highlighting environment is required.
accessibility: The copy action has matching accessible-name and visible-tooltip status wording, and the code remains selectable text.
Language and filename labels supplement rather than replace the code content.
responsiveBehavior: Long lines scroll horizontally and do not widen the owning transcript.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
